Name: Add Values To Reference List
Author: Admin
Description: Add values to a reference list in Google Chronicle.

Parameters.Description: Specify the display name of the reference list that needs to be updated
Specify a comma-separated list of values that need to be added to a reference list

AIDescription:
Adds specific values to a Google Chronicle reference list. This action is used to manage and update threat intelligence lists or allow/block lists stored within Google Chronicle by appending new entries to an existing list.

### Parameters
| Parameter Name | Type | Mandatory | Description |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| Reference List Name | String | Yes | Specify the display name of the reference list that needs to be updated. |
| Values | String | Yes | Specify a comma-separated list of values (CSV) that need to be added to the reference list. |

### Flow Description
1. **Fetch Current List:** The action first retrieves the current state and existing entries of the specified reference list from Google Chronicle.
2. **Process Input:** It parses the provided comma-separated string of values and removes any empty entries.
3. **Deduplication:** It compares the input values against the existing entries in the reference list to identify only the new values that need to be added.
4. **Update List:** If new values are found, it performs a PATCH request to the Google Chronicle API to update the reference list with the combined set of old and new values.
5. **Result Reporting:** The action returns the updated reference list object as JSON and provides a success message.
